description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CodeQL that analyzes code for security vulnerabilities and errors. The workflow should trigger on push to the main branch, on pull requests to the main branch, and on a scheduled basis (Monday to Saturday, 1:00 AM). Use an ubuntu-latest job with read permissions for actions and repository contents, and write permission for security events. Perform CodeQL analysis for Python using the CodeQL tools, autobuilding any compiled languages if possible.
